% Generated preamble -- regenerated every run. Do not edit; edit main.tex instead.
% NOTE: sn-jnl force-loads hyperref itself with no options (see manifest.yaml),
% so its styling is set here via \PassOptionsToPackage, matching the
% \DEFAULT_HYPERREF_LINE the emitter always appends -- see
% latextify/emit/project.py's _ensure_hyperref for why the two must agree.
\PassOptionsToPackage{colorlinks=true,linkcolor=blue,citecolor=blue,urlcolor=blue}{hyperref}
